deals.name: Among Us
deals.short_description: An online and local party game of teamwork and betrayal for 4-15 players...in space!
deals.detailed_description:
Play with 4-15 player online or via local WiFi as you attempt to prepare your spaceship for departure, but beware as one or more random players among the Crew are Impostors bent on killing everyone!

Originally created as a party game, we recommend playing with friends at a LAN party or online using voice chat. Enjoy cross-platform play between Android, iOS, PC, and console.


  • Win by completing tasks to prepare the ship or ejecting all Impostors.
  • React quickly to undo the Impostor's sabotages.
  • Check the Admin map and Security cameras to keep tabs on other Crewmates.
  • Report any dead bodies immediately to start discussion of who the suspected Impostor is.
  • Call emergency meetings to discuss suspicious behavior.
  • Vote to eject suspected Impostors.



  • Kill Crewmates and frame bystanders.
  • Pretend to run tasks to blend in with the crewmates.
  • Sneak through the vents to quickly move about the ship.
  • Use sabotages to cause chaos and divide the crew.
  • Close doors to trap victims and kill in private.

Features

  • Customization: Pick your color, hat, visor, skin, and pet.
  • Lots of game options: Add more Impostors, more tasks, different roles, and so much more!
  • Different modes to choose from: Classic or Hide n Seek.
  • 4 different maps to play in: The Skeld, MIRA HQ, Polus, and the Airship.
  • Quickly find a game online from the host list.
  • In-game text chat.
  • Rich Discord integration.
  • Cross-platform play between PC, console, Android, and iOS!

deals.name: Super Jigsaw Puzzle: Generations - Anime Puzzles 2
deals.short_description: Awesome anime images provided by Studio Ghibli, directly from their movies.
deals.detailed_description:
Awesome anime images provided by Studio Ghibli, directly from their movies.

Content: 30 Puzzles in 4 levels of difficulty.


*All images are owned by Studio Ghibli and have been released by them for free use.

deals.name: Voor De Kroon
deals.short_description: Fight for control during the Friso-Hollandic Wars. Set in the medieval 13th century, the game features a strategy campaign and historical battles. Fight alongside your army in 3rd person battles and command your troops in this strategy-action game.
deals.detailed_description:
Fight for control during the Friso-Hollandic Wars. Set in the medieval 13th century, the game features a strategy campaign and historical battles. Fight alongside your army in 3rd person battles and command your troops in this strategy-action game.

Voor de kroon is a medieval wargame.

The game uses Unreal Engine and Metahuman technology to make the historically researched characters come alive.

Fight in medieval battles: participate in 13th century skirmishes or play intense siege battles.

Conquer a historical recreation of the 13th century low countries. Manage your settlements and officers. Eliminate your enemies.

Dive into rich customization options which allow you to create your own factions, swords, castles, units and campaigns and share them in the Steam workshop.

Solo developed with ♥ in The Netherlands

deals.name: Fall of an Empire
deals.short_description: As Emperor of a crumbling realm, hold back collapse in this grand strategy epic. Fall of an Empire has you balance deadly politics, manage resources, and command battles to survive invasions and intrigue in a vast, Roman-inspired world.
deals.detailed_description:
The empire is dying. You’ve seized the throne. Survival is victory. Seize control of an ailing empire, clinging to echoes of its former glory. Unlike traditional grand strategy games of expansion and conquest, Fall of an Empire challenges you to manage an empire on the brink of collapse. Face invading barbarian hordes, manage internal revolts, and engage in relentless political intrigue.

Your rule will not last forever. How long can you defy history and halt its decline?

Command an Empire in Decline

You have seized power in a violent coup, crowning yourself Emperor of a crumbling realm. Millions await your orders, but your legions are stretched thin, your coffers are empty, and your provinces are rife with unrest. 

It is up to you to defy history and extend the life of your empire through iron will, cunning politics, and brilliant strategy.

Master Treacherous Politics & Intrigue

Manage a living world filled with unique, simulated characters—senators, generals, governors, and spies. Each character has their own evolving traits, personal ambitions, and loyalties. 

Exploit rivalries, uncover conspiracies, and forge fragile alliances to keep your throne. Reward your loyalists with power or eliminate threats in cold blood.

Rule a Massive, Living World

Exercise dominion over hundreds of settlements and millions of subjects across a sprawling, dynamic map. Build fortifications, manage resources and oversee simulated convoy supply lines on the map itself, allowing you to orchestrate raids and bolster your coffers. Watch cities visibly grow…or burn. 

Navigate changing seasons that test your logistics, from famine-inducing winters to bountiful harvests in the springs.

Experience Truly Immersive Stories

Dynamic storylines take your whole empire into account. When your capital burns, your court knows. When your loyal general grows old and bitter, his betrayal will make sense. No two playthroughs tell the same story.

Fight on Every Front

Engage in a unique hybrid battle system combining real-time strategy with timed turn-based decision-making. 

Direct your armies across multiple fronts simultaneously, then zoom into key battles to make crucial tactical calls that can turn the tide.

Survive at Any Cost

Your empire is destined to fall, but your legacy is measured by how long you’re able to halt your empire’s decline. 

Allocate dwindling resources, maintain fragile order, and respond to ever-shifting threats in a brutal test of strategic endurance.

Key Features

  • Survival through cunning strategy

  • Deep character-driven gameplay

  • An expansive living world

  • Advanced resource management

  • Real-time hybrid battle system

The fate of millions rests in your hands. How long can you hold back the Fall of an Empire?

deals.name: Esoteric Ebb
deals.short_description: Esoteric Ebb is a single-player CRPG inspired by the freedom of tabletop adventures. Unravel a political conspiracy with your goblin sidekick. Roll dice in tense encounters. Become a cleric of legends or completely ruin the campaign.
deals.detailed_description:
JOIN OUR DISCORD


About the Game

Esoteric Ebb is an isometric, Disco-like, TTRPG-turned-CRPG set in a bizarre post-Arcanepunk fantasy setting. You are The Cleric, an expert in esoteric events, and a glorified government goon. Inspired by classic CRPG games, Esoteric Ebb features deep and branching dialogs with a staggering amount of choices.

Create the world’s worst cleric. Take on the city through tense TTRPG dice rolls. Struggle to maintain control with your Stats chiming in at every moment. Let the voices guide you into insane encounters and hit that natural 20 right when you need it. Become the most interesting player at the table and completely ruin your DM’s day.

Five days until the first-ever election, a tea shop explodes in the heart of the city. They send you to deal with the mess.

You wake up in a morgue with half the river in your boots, surrounded by ten thousand rotting apples, several corpses, and one zombie. Out of your depth and with no official backup, you delve into your beloved city to investigate the impossible mystery no one wants you to solve. Juggle factions and play them against each other. Explore the streets and tunnels of a fantasy metropolis. Debate devils, drunk sphinxes, and all manner of fantastical fools in a world where mythological creatures sell newspapers at corner shops and ideologies overtake the ramblings of dead gods.

Don’t forget the most important question: What are you voting in the election?

MAKE CHOICES THAT WILL COME BACK TO BITE YOU. Shifting alliances! Risky dungeoneering! Complete open-ended quests, low and high-stakes alike, set in the streets, towers, and dark tunnels of Norvik. Become the city’s savior, its demise, or bumble your way into absolute power.

TRUST THE DICE. Let chance guide you! Roll to wrestle dwarves, steal anything in sight, or to keep yourself from looking like a complete fool. But remember, in true TTRPG fashion, failure can often be way more interesting.

IT'S ALL IN YOUR HEAD. Debate yourself! Each Ability Stat has a conflicting viewpoint and loves to interrupt important conversations. No matter whose side you fall on, you'll complete quests in wonderfully ridiculous ways.

WIELD REALITY-SHAPING MAGIC. Use The Cleric’s power for unique narrative choices. Control minds for fun and profit. Detect secrets in the tunnels below or in the thoughts of your enemies. Speak with anyone, living or dead, just to see how they insult you.

TURN-BASED ENCOUNTERS. Clerics in Norvik are taught to use violence as a last resort. When the need does arise, a roll of the dice determines life or death. But you always have a bizarre solution to any problem, don’t you?

THE QUESTING TREE. Your quest log, skill tree, and mind map all at once. Each Quest Branch can take root in your mind and alter The Cleric’s playstyle through game-changing feats.

deals.name: Pixelmancer
deals.short_description: Pixelmancer is a casual roguelite game developed by a single developer - You play as a mage with companions that will aid on your journey, you can upgrade almost anything for your hero, beasts & weapons. You will die constantly but become stronger with every death - How far can you go?
deals.detailed_description:
Pixelmancer is a casual roguelite game developed by a single developer - You play as a mage with companions that will aid on your journey, you can upgrade almost anything for your hero, beasts & weapons.

You will die constantly but become stronger with every death - How far can you go?

The beginning of the game can be difficult as your hero will be weak but your enemies will drop soulstones upon death and with soulstones you can upgrade your hero and your beast companion and go back into the world and try again.


- - - Features - - -

Controller Support

In addition to Mouse & Keyboard, there is full Xbox controller support and any other xinput controllers.

Native Steam Deck Support

Pixelmancer supports Steam Deck natively, no Proton or Steam Play required.

Cross-save between Windows, Linux & Steam Deck also supported.

No Micro-transactions Or DLCs

There are no micro-transactions in this game nor any planned ones. There are also no intentions of working on DLCs, all new content will be received as FREE updates.

- - - Game Features - - -

Adventure Mode

You'll be spawned into level one of the world and work your way up the tiers with more and more enemies to defeat as well as meeting new enemies. Dying in adventure mode will reset you back to level one in the world but you keep your Soulstones and player progression, you will re-enter the world stronger than previously and try to get further than before.

Survival Mode

You'll spawn on an island where you will be surrounded by enemies. Each second you survive, the more difficult the game becomes. It's a great fun way to gather Soulstones. The survival island also expands the further you progress in adventure mode.

Lots Of Upgrades!

There are over 40 skills to upgrade from. You can upgrade almost anything, for example you can upgrade Pixelmancer's movement speed, mana regen, fireball damage and its velocity. There are also beast companions in the game that you can upgrade, for example their max health, damage, movement speed, detection radius and revive speed.

Beast Companions

  • Pixie - Your first loyal companion that stays with you forever

  • Stadie - Favourite by the community, Stadie can take down enemies with range attacks

  • Honey - The world's cutest and best bear, Honey is your front line tank pulling enemies for you

  • Twilight - A reincarnation beast that loves to collect stones for you

  • Anima - Grave stone companion which you can raise from the dead and be part of your companion horde

Weapon Types

There are multiple weapons to unlock, each with unique abilities that changes your playstyle.

World Tiers

Explore 5 different world tiers, each with their own unique enemies and visual elements.

Dynamic Event System

This system provides random events that may occur in your adventure, some events can be bad or good, events can also stack.

Soul Hunter

When you spawn into the world, you arrive with a summoning portal. Watch your back though as Soul Hunters are known to use summoning portals too.

Soul Mastery

Defeating enemies will increase your Luckstone and with it you will increase your drop rate for Soulstones that can be used to upgrade your abilities.

deals.name: Warhammer 40,000: Space Marine 2
deals.short_description: Embody the superhuman skill and brutality of a Space Marine. Unleash deadly abilities and devastating weaponry to obliterate the relentless Tyranid swarms. Defend the Imperium in spectacular third-person action in solo or multiplayer modes.
deals.detailed_description:
EDITIONS BREAKDOWN


About the Game

Embody the superhuman skill and brutality of a Space Marine. Unleash deadly abilities and devastating weaponry to obliterate the relentless Tyranid swarms. Defend the Imperium in spectacular third-person action in solo or multiplayer modes.

Fight the enemies of Mankind as Lieutenant Demetrian Titus in this sequel to 2011’s Space Marine, and prove your loyalty once again as you are reinstated to the Ultramarines. Hold at bay the horrors of the galaxy in epic battles on far-flung planets and uncover dark secrets to drive back the everlasting night.

Dive into a war of galactic proportions! Enjoy intense, gory and fast-paced third-person action with hundreds of enemies on screen, and purge the relentless Tyranid swarms made possible by Saber’s trademark Swarm Engine.

Jump in endlessly brutal and replayable PvE and PvP modes as your own Space Marines, unlocking new skills and cosmetics the more you play! Fight as one of seven unique classes, unlock up to 25 perks for each class, add perks to each of your weapons, and customise your appearance with a huge array of armour and weapon cosmetics!

Tear through unending waves of Tyranid and Chaos assaults and fight to survive as long as you can in the unforgiving 3-player Siege mode. Accumulate points with each wave you defeat to spend on ammunition, equipment charges, Medicae Stimms and more… or use them to summon reinforcements like Cadians, Space Marines or the mighty Dreadnought.

deals.name: Fur and Fangs
deals.short_description: A fast-paced action roguelike where players defend their homeland against endless waves of invading mice—solo or with up to 4 players.
deals.detailed_description:
Defend your land from waves of invading mice!
Play solo or with up to 4 players in this fast-paced action roguelike where heroic animals fight to protect their homeland. Choose from a variety of upgrades, level up your abilities, and face off against endless waves of enemies and powerful bosses. Whether you’re jumping in for a quick run or grinding to unlock permanent upgrades, each session brings new chaos and fun.

Easy to pick up and hard to put down, this game is all about quick action, teamwork, and constant progression. The more you play, the stronger you get!

deals.name: Tom Clancy’s The Division® 2
deals.short_description: Join The Division in this open world tactical shooter. Engage in intense cover-based combat, team up with friends, and build your ultimate agent to save Washington, D.C.
deals.detailed_description:
Comparative Grid


Ultimate Edition



TOM CLANCY’S THE DIVISION 2 ULTIMATE EDITION INCLUDES:

· The base game;
· The Warlords of New York expansion;
· The Battle for Brooklyn DLC;
· 1,000 Bonus Premium Credits;
· A level 40 boost, allowing you to jump into the Battle for Brooklyn campaign;
· Stash space increase;
· All six endgame Specializations instantly unlocked;
· Eight exclusive missions;
· The Battleworn Secret Service Pack;
· The First Responder Pack;
· The Elite Agent Pack;
· One exclusive emote and outfit.


Gold Edition



TOM CLANCY’S THE DIVISION 2 GOLD EDITION INCLUDES:

· The base game;
· The Warlords of New York expansion;
· The Battle for Brooklyn DLC;
· A level 40 boost, allowing you to jump into the Battle for Brooklyn campaign;
· Stash space increase.


About the Game

Defend and rebuild Washington, D.C. after a devastating pandemic in this tactical open world third-person shooter:

TACTICAL COMBAT


Engage enemies in intense, cover-based firefights where tactical positioning and utility usage make the difference between life and death.

BUILD THE ULTIMATE AGENT


Loot and craft cutting-edge gear and learn powerful skills to customize the way you fight. Take things further with Specializations, with roles like the long-range marksman, the demolition expert, the survivalist leader, and more.

TEAMWORK SAVES LIVES


Team up with up to three other agents for tactical co-op missions where synergy matters. Combine Specializations, share resources, and take on dynamic challenges that scale with your squad.

SURVIVE EVER-EVOLVING WASHINGTON, D.C.


From tense firefights in changing weather to the constant push and pull of factions warring over map control, the city reacts, adapts, and challenges you to survive with every move you make.

VISCERAL ENDGAME


Reaching max level is just the start. Dive into high-stakes endgame missions, intense PvP battles, and dynamic world events that push your skills and teamwork to the limit. Every season brings fresh rewards and fierce challenges.

deals.name: Doppelscape
deals.short_description: Sci-fi roguelike deckbuilder with hex-based tactics. You are trapped in a simulation. Build team wide synergies and use clever positioning to defeat enemies and escape from Doppelscape.
deals.detailed_description:
Discord Community


About the Game

Doppelscape combines the deckbuilding of Slay the Spire with the tactical game play of Into the Breach.

Features

  • Team-based strategy: Play a team of three characters. Build decks that with synergy across the whole team and balance each other's strengths and weaknesses. Each character has unique cards, mechanics, and strategy.


  • Hex-based tactics: Positioning matters. Push, pull, shove, and teleport your enemies into position for a devastating area of effect attack. Position your characters in range of buffs and out of harms way. Use the terrain to your advantage by taking up defensive positions or discovering location based bonuses.


  • Dynamic Deckbuilding: Build your deck each run as you attempt to escape from Doppelscape. Choose from hundreds of cards. Discover unique synergies and builds. But make sure you have the power to survive until your combos come together.


  • Unique relic system: Find equipment that drastically alters game play and deckbuilding decisions. Items must be equipped in specific slots such as head, chest, or software.

deals.name: Nauts
deals.short_description: Nauts is a space action roguelike. Run and develop your civilization in a mysterious and dangerous universe. Knowledge will be your best tool: explore and discover what is hidden in to the Cosmos while surviving as many dangers that will appear on your journey.
deals.detailed_description:
A NEW SPACE ROGUELITE

Face enemy waves and survive this hostile universe!

Equip yourself and to explore everything within your reach before it's too late.

ARM YOURSELF, CREATE SYNERGIES, DESTROY YOUR ENEMIES

Weapons evolve at your will; discover which ones best suit your playstyle, combine them with mysterious Techs, and harness the most powerful synergies the universe has to offer. The only limit to combinations is your imagination.

WHAT MYSTERIES LIE HIDDEN?

Each game is unique: the setting, waves, and progression are governed by random algorithms. Forge your own path in this open environment and uncover what's happening around you. The ruins of an ancient civilization watch over you: don't meet the same fate as the Ancients.

KEY FEATURES

  • Civilization and resource management

  • Combat with bullet hell elements

  • Frenzied encounters

  • Seven different weapon types, each with its own evolution tree and characteristics

  • Over 30 Techs that change the gameplay from match to match

  • Endless combinations of weapons and Techs

  • Unique, entirely original environment and universe

  • A hidden story to discover

  • Hidden mechanics

deals.name: DrainSim
deals.short_description: Dive into DrainSim and seize control of the floods! Clear the city's submerged streets, with a huge range of different tools from rakes to submersible pumps. Embrace the satisfaction of restoring the water flow. Become the city's hero, one drain at a time.
deals.detailed_description:
Day-Night cycle and realistic water physics!

Plan your Mission!

For each mission, you'll receive crucial intel in advance and must carefully plan the tools you want to bring. Consider the time of day, type of terrain, and distance from your generator to your electric tools. Working late into the evening? Don't forget floodlights! Need to drain multiple areas simultaneously? Bring extra pumps and generators! Is there digable Ground? Better bring a Shovel!

With each mission success, you'll earn recognition and unlock new tools and upgrades to boost your drainage capabilities.

Loads of different tools and unique Levels

Armed with an assortment of drain-clearing tools and equipment, from your trusty rake to water pumps, you'll tackle every challenge with precision and skill. From casual players to seasoned pros, DrainSim offers an engaging experience for all who seek the satisfaction of restoring order to the city's drainage system. So dive in, roll up your sleeves, and let DrainSim flush away your concerns one drain at a time.

deals.name: Assassin’s Creed Shadows
deals.short_description: Experience an epic action-adventure story set in feudal Japan! Become a lethal shinobi assassin and powerful legendary samurai as you explore a beautiful open world in a time of chaos.
deals.detailed_description:
Reviews


Comparison Grid


Premium Edition

The Assassin’s Creed Shadows Premium Edition includes:

- The base game

- Sekiryu Gear Set for both Naoe and Yasuke

- Eye of the Dragon Katana

- Claw of the Dragon Long Katana

- Sekiryu Beast Mount

- Dragon Tooth Trinket

- The Claws of Awaji Expansion, which features a new region, a new weapon, new skills, and 10+ hours of content.


Deluxe Edition

The Assassin’s Creed Shadows Digital Deluxe Edition includes:

- The base game

- The Sekiryu Dual Pack including gear and weapon sets for both Naoe and Yasuke, the Sekiryu Beast, and Dragon Tooth trinket

- The Sekiryu Hideout Pack including four unique ornaments to customize the hideout for your shinobi league

- Five mastery points


PC Specifications


About the Game

MASTER THE DEEPEST STEALTH MECHANISMS OF THE SERIES & FIGHT IN VISCERAL COMBAT

“Shadows is some of the most fun I’ve had with a stealth game in a decade” —PC Gamer

Play as Naoe, a quick-witted shinobi, and use light, sound, and shadows to evade detection. Infiltrate enemy strongholds with many parkour options including the new grappling hook, distract guards with shuriken or smoke bombs, and assassinate your targets with your Hidden Blade. As the samurai Yasuke, use silent bow takedowns or unleash devastating melee combos with your katana or naginata.

Switch between these two heroes to adapt your strategy and experience feudal Japan through two radically different approaches – stealth and strength, shadows and steel.

DEEP-DIVE INTO THE CAPTIVATING WORLD OF ASSASSIN'S CREED SHADOWS

“Assassin’s Creed Shadows creates one of the best versions of the open-world style.” —IGN

Step into feudal Japan like never before! From majestic castle towns to serene shrines and sweeping countryside, Assassin’s Creed Shadows offers a breathtaking open world where dynamic seasons, shifting weather, and environmental destruction affect your tactical approach.

And, to get full immersion, experience the game through Japanese voiceover.

DISCOVER THE MOST TECHNICALLY ADVANCED ASSASSIN’S CREED GAME YET

“It leads to one of the most dynamic, fun, and best-looking open-world games I’ve played this generation.” —Kotaku

Experience a true next-gen leap with Assassin’s Creed Shadows, powered by the updated Anvil engine. Explore a world brought to life with ray-traced Global Illumination, real-time reflections, virtualized geometry, and dynamic wind and environmental particles.

From the shimmer of lantern light on rain-slick rooftops to the rustle of cherry blossoms in the wind, every detail is crafted to immerse you deeper into feudal Japan.

A GLOBAL HIT

Whether you are a veteran Assassin’s Creed player or new to the franchise, feudal Japan awaits you! Join a community of millions of players and discover a title GameSpot describes as "an absolute blast to play," Eurogamer.es as "the best Assassin's Creed of the modern era" and GamingTrend as “the new benchmark for the series.”

deals.name: Lil Elfred Re:Gifted
deals.short_description: It's up to you as a little elf to deliver presents in this cute platformer! While you're at it, you can also leave these women some warm, holiday "cheer" by having sex! A short but sweet lewd quest where you travel across rooftops, collect candy canes, and give cute girls a naughty & jolly time!
deals.detailed_description:
It's the most jolly time of the year - help Elfred spread holiday 'joy' (sex) to all! 


◆ Simple platforming fun! 🎄

Using simple keyboard controls, play as Elfred the elf! Walk, jump, and crouch to traverse various rooftops, collect candy canes, and enter homes to deliver gifts and some extra holiday "cheer" in this short but sweet little trip!

◆ Leave presents, have naughty fun with cute girls! 🎁

As you slip into chimneys to leave behind presents, you'll find various women relaxing by the fireplace. You're already leaving gifts, might as well leave these girls with some plentiful, warm, holiday "cheer"~!

◆ Enjoy 10 different sexy hand-drawn ladies and animations on this mini-holiday quest!  💖

Unlock a gallery for them, or if you're feeling particularly jolly, you can try to unlock all the achievements for fun!

We hope this remade version of Lil' Elfred brings some lewd, jolly times to you all - happy holidays!

deals.name: Quarantine Zone: The Last Check
deals.short_description: Command the checkpoint in a collapsing city. Screen survivors, manage scarce resources, and hold back the undead. Every choice matters and one mistake could unleash the plague beyond your walls.
deals.detailed_description:
Quarantine Zone: The Last Check puts you in charge of a critical checkpoint during a zombie outbreak.

Armed with advanced screening tools and your own instincts, you must decide who gets through and who stays behind. One wrong choice could let the infection slip past your post.

But holding the line is only the beginning. You’ll need to manage scarce resources, reinforce defenses, and keep your camp alive as chaos intensifies with each passing day.

SEE IT? SORT IT

Use high-tech tools to uncover signs of infection among the terrified survivors. Identify contraband, forbidden items, and even rare collectables as you work to keep your checkpoint secure. Send those with suspicious symptoms to quarantine for observation, to the lab for additional screening, or save healthy survivors by sending them to the living block. And those who show to be infected… well, they don't stand a chance anyway.

COMMAND THE CATASTROPHE

As the survivor population swells, you’ll be relied upon to provide essentials such as power, food, and medicine. When the alarms are raised, pilot armed drones to ensure the infected don’t breach the compound. The better you manage your ever-expanding base, the more resources, tools, and weapon upgrades you’ll unlock.

LEARN. ADAPT. SURVIVE.

When a quarantined survivor becomes an undead predator, all is not lost! Keep newly turned zombies confined to harvest and prepare samples in return for new tools, staff XP, and long-term upgrades. Individuals with unknown symptoms can also be analyzed, but these tests are always fatal to the subject. Will you choose to preserve life? Or will you pursue knowledge at any cost?

deals.name: PEAK
deals.short_description: PEAK is a co-op climbing game where the slightest mistake can spell your doom. Either solo or as a group of lost nature scouts, your only hope of rescue from a mysterious island is to scale the mountain at its center. Do you have what it takes to reach the PEAK?
deals.detailed_description:
PEAK is a co-op climbing game where the slightest mistake can spell your doom. Either solo or as a group of lost nature scouts, your only hope of rescue from a mysterious island is to scale the mountain at its center. Do you have what it takes to reach the PEAK?

WORK TOGETHER

Need a Hand? You’ll need to rely on your friends to have any hope of scaling the mountain, which changes every single day. Help each other up ledges, or place ropes and climbing spikes to make the way easier for those who come after.

CLIMB

The Mountain Takes no Prisoners! Climb through 4 biomes on your way to the PEAK, each with their own life-threatening obstacles. You’ll need to scavenge for questionable food to survive, and manage your injuries carefully - every setback limits your stamina, making it harder to climb.

SURVIVE

Prepare For the Worst: Discover a variety of helpful survival items, from energy drinks to climbing spikes to the mysterious Anti-Rope. You’ve got no hope of making it to the PEAK unless you press every advantage given to you.

A NEW ISLAND EACH DAY

The game's map rotates out every 24 hours! Try out the new layout each day, or give the same island multiple attempts in a day until you conquer it.

EARN BADGES

A Well-Seasoned Scout: Show off your survival prowess with dozens of badges to earn and cosmetics to unlock.

CLIMBING IS BETTER WITH FRIENDS

Multiplayer in PEAK is friends-only - invite up to three other scouts through Steam to climb together, or face the mountain alone if you're really brave!

FEATURES

  • Climb with a total of 4 friends

  • Communicate through proximity chat 

  • 4 different biomes to ascend through

  • A bunch of questionable foods

  • Lots of different climbing items

  • Campfires and marshmallows

  • Character customization

  • Online co-op and offline single player

  • Ghosts

deals.name: Lust Arcanum
deals.short_description: Join Kyra, a half-dragon maiden cursed with endless lust, in this heartwarming slice-of-life adventure! Explore enchanted realms with a circle of unique maidens, each with their own ambition. Help satisfy their desires as you search for the bond Kyra desperately seeks!
deals.detailed_description:
Kyra, cursed with insatiable desire, uncovers an ancient civilization that mastered endless pleasure. While exploring the ruins for treasures, she seduces the wild inhabitants she encounters, extracting their lustful essence. These essences not only unlock new skills for future encounters but also allow her to summon monsters for playtime.

As Kyra rebuild the Arcanum in the ruins, curious maidens with unique desires join her. Share monster playmates and intriguing treasures from Kyra's adventures with them to uncover their stories and sexy contents.

The girls channel their power to support Kyra’s adventure, enhancing her efficiency in extracting monster essences and gathering resources. Make their rooms more comfortable, and they’ll channel even greater power.

Everyone has different preferences for playmates and playstyles. Collect more monsters and treasures to unlock a variety of sexy content, including writings, chibi arts, and fully animated hand-drawn scenes.

Lust Arcanum features interactive scenes with hand-drawn animations. You control animation speed, camera movement, and costume changes, with all scenes fully voiced by talented actors.

Key Features:

  • Adult Content: Fully-voiced intimate scenarios with interactive control for all female characters

  • Storytelling: Slice-of-life narratives featuring a varied cast of characters 

  • Diverse Exploration: Adventure across various terrain types, each containing unique environmental puzzles and creatures 

  • Creature Collection System: Capture and develop a variety of monsters for both battle teams and adult content

  • Strategic Combat: Engage in tactical battles with your collected creatures with dice-rolling mechanics

  • RPG Progression: Character and monster leveling systems that allow for customized development paths

  • Customization Options: Unlock decorative elements and costumes to personalize your experience

The Cast:

deals.name: Mark of Cain
deals.short_description: Mark of Cain is a cursed, fast-paced retro FPS where you’re immortal, hunted, and mocked by meme-fueled demons. No seasons, no BS just blood, jokes, and pure arena chaos. Solo dev btw
deals.detailed_description:
Mark of Cain

What FPS was meant to be: fast, brutal, and just a little bit cursed.

Mark of Cain is a retro-inspired 2.5D arena shooter in the blood-soaked spirit of Doom, Quake, and Ultrakill but with a twisted edge all its own.

Play as John Demonhunter, a demon-slaying Greek badass cursed by God Himself to suffer eternal life—and eternal combat.

After centuries of slaughter, John got cocky.

The big guy upstairs took offense and branded him with the Mark of Cain a glowing symbol of divine punishment that ensures he can never die… but also never rest. Now Devil, seeing a golden opportunity, unleashes wave after wave of hellspawn, meme-fueled bosses, and cursed chaos to make John's unkillable life a living nightmare.

Welcome to a world where every demon is an inside joke, every death is a punchline, and survival is just the setup for the next round of absurdity.

FEATURES

Classic Arena FPS Madness
5 weapon loadouts, secrets, blood and dopamine. Inspired by the best of the '90s but unshackled from nostalgia. Run, gun, bunny-hop, wall jump, and blast through dense enemies in tight, explosive maps.

Old-School Campaign Mode

Battle through the campaign inspired by Quake and Doom, featuring episodic content released for free as development progresses. Each episode expands the lore, introduces new enemies, and pushes John Demonhunter further into divine damnation.

Breakcore Soundtrack (Made by Me, Because Who Else Could Handle It?)

Rip and tear to an original breakcore soundtrack composed by the developer pure chaos, distortion, and adrenaline.

Making Fun of The Whole Genre
Face off against bosses that mock modern gaming, from the Ad Boss who spams you with unskippable ads every time you get hit, to the Tiny Flea who exists solely to shove you off ledges while insulting your skill.

4 Player Split-Screen in this Economy???? 
He is John Demonhunter, He is John Demonhunter, You are John Demonhunter, I'm John Demonhunter, are there any other John Demonhunters I should know about!?

In-Game Level Editor & Steam Workshop Support

Forge your own cursed arenas with the built-in level editor, then share them or suffer through others’ twisted creations on the Steam Workshop. Build it, break it, or get obliterated by it.

Too Much For Zblock
Wall-jumps, air-dashes, slide-kicks, and zero mercy. Speed is survival. Master the movement system or get steamrolled.

No AAAAA BS
No battle passes. No season. No dlc.

Free rewards !!!!

Cursed Humor. No Apologies.
Meta jokes, meme enemies, bizarre dialogue, and zero fourth wall. It’s a fever dream of classic FPS chaos with a knowing smirk and a middle finger raised skyward.

deals.name: Echoes of Red
deals.short_description: Echoes of Red is a fast-paced roguelite shooter where you can carry unlimited weapons at once, face endless enemies ever stronger and build your perfect custom loadout. Obliterate tens of thousands of enemies who dared to challenge you and make them regret standing against you.
deals.detailed_description:
Obliterate tens of thousands of enemies who dared to challenge you.

Custom loadout

Choose your class, equipment, upgrades and melees to discover each time new powerful synergies.

Carry up to 11 weapons at once and improve them by eliminating ever stronger enemies.

  • Equipment

  • Classes

Gameplay

  • 105 upgrades, 30 unlockable equipment, 10 deck cards, and 8 artifact weapons to build your OP arsenal.

  • Eliminate all enemies, face mini-bosses, and win by defeating the Archon of Red.

  • 6 different mini-bosses that teleport, grab, summon enemies, and much more.

  • 4 classes, each with 4 weapons to suit any playstyle.

  • Matches lasting 15 minutes.

  • 9 difficulty levels, including Madness, One-Shot, Continuous Elite, and Infinite Survival.

  • Collect souls to unlock new upgrades and fragments to enhance your weapons.

  • Destroy minerals scattered across the map for small stat bonuses.

  • Auto-aim and manual fire, with faster movement when not shooting.

  • Slide through almost anything without taking damage.

  • Unlock familiars that automatically gather resources, block, and attack enemies.

deals.name: Bochi Collection
deals.short_description: An anthology of short indie games with emotional storytelling and simple gameplay. Discover unique experiences, each with distinct art, music, and tone. Perfect for players who enjoy narrative adventures, hidden details, and bite-sized stories.
deals.detailed_description:
Bochi Collection is an anthology of short narrative experiences. Each story offers a unique world, art direction, and tone, from unsettling to heartwarming, designed to be experienced in just a few minutes.

Though brief, these experiences aim to linger in your mind long after they end. Every story holds its own atmosphere, emotions, and hidden details waiting to be discovered.

Each experience includes optional challenges and secrets for players who wish to explore deeper.

Included Games

Repair Me: A quiet story about healing and self-acceptance.

You play as Aida, a fragile soul trying to put herself back together. Explore her inner world through light, reflective interactions that mirror the process of recovery.

I Need a Home: A side-scrolling adventure where you guide a stray dog through city streets in search of love and safety.

Simple movement and environmental storytelling reveal a touching reflection on belonging.

Don't Play This: A "game within a game" where nostalgia meets grief. Pick up your father’s old console and play the game that defined your childhood. It is a bittersweet journey of discovery to finally find some peace.

My Bubble 64: Collect soap bottles in a colorful, nostalgic world, but listen closely.

Beneath the cheerful gameplay lies a subtle story about escape and the fragile comfort of imagination.

Features

  • Four short, standalone games (5 - 10 minutes each)

  • Distinct art styles

  • Accessible, minimalist gameplay focused on story

  • Secrets and hidden interactions to discover

deals.name: Return to Dark Castle
deals.short_description: The classic returns to punish the bold. A re-imagined retro platformer of precision, peril, and persistence — featuring every level from Dark Castle and Beyond Dark Castle plus 50 brand-new punishing rooms rebuilt for modern systems.
deals.detailed_description:
Return to Dark Castle revives the legendary Macintosh series that defined precision platforming and comic peril. 

This definitive edition includes the complete Dark Castle (1986) and Beyond Dark Castle (1987) adventures — rebuilt with color visuals, remastered audio, original music and refined controls — plus 50 all-new rooms created exclusively for this release. 

Step into the boots of a new hero on a quest to defeat the Black Knight and reclaim the castle’s secrets. Expect classic challenge, slapstick misfortune, and finely tuned puzzle-platforming that rewards skill and patience. 

Features 

- All original Dark Castle and Beyond Dark Castle levels, fully remastered 

- 50 brand-new rooms designed by Z Sculpt 

- Gamepad and keyboard support on all platforms 

- Save, replay, and share your best runs 

- Built-in homage to the series’ 1980s roots 

 
About Ludit Holdings: 

Ludit is an independent studio founded by Mark Stephen Pierce, co-creator of the original Dark Castle series. 
Ludit is dedicated to reviving the classic Dark Castle franchise while preserving the precision and humor that made them timeless. 
 
About Z Sculpt:  

Formed in 1998 as a Macintosh shareware company. Today, Z Sculpt makes mobile, PC/Mac, and virtual reality games.

deals.name: Cat Adoption Tales
deals.short_description: Foster and care for adorable hand drawn cats in this cozy 2D sim set to original Lo-Fi music.
deals.detailed_description:
Foster hand drawn cats in this cozy 2D cat simulation game with original lo-fi music. 

Keep an eye on their hunger, happiness, cleanliness, and energy. 

Play mini-games to earn items and money then spend your earnings in the shop to buy food, toys and more.
Send them on adventures to discover rare items, or let them out on adventures while you are not playing. 


Once the cat is ready they will go to their forever home - as you level up you will unlock new cats to foster, with new goals. 


Cozy & Relaxing: A gentle 2D game designed for unwinding at your own pace. 
Wholesome Lo-Fi Vibes: No timers, no stress — just you, a cat and some goals to tick off when you are ready.
OST by Jack the Robot

deals.name: Idle Rat: Island Digger
deals.short_description: A relaxing pixel art idle digging game. A clever little rat uncovers treasures beneath a tropical island while running on top of all applications. Upgrade your stats, sell your finds, and progress at your own pace.
deals.detailed_description:
Idle Rat: Island Digger

Dig. Discover. Relax. Always on top.

Idle Rat: Island Digger is a cozy idle digging game about small progress, quiet satisfaction, and watching a tiny worker do its thing while you focus on whatever else you’re doing.

A clever little rat has arrived on a peaceful tropical island, and beneath the sand lies a whole world waiting to be uncovered. Dig through layers of sand and stone, discover hidden treasures, sell what you find, and slowly turn effort into steady progress.

The game is designed to be always on top of all applications. It stays visible above everything else on your desktop, so your rat keeps digging while you work, browse, watch videos, or relax. You can freely move and resize the window to fit your perfect setup. This is not just a feature, it is the core experience.

Play actively or let it run quietly in the background. Your rat never stops working.

Dig at Your Own Pace

Watch your rat dig automatically, layer by layer. There is no rush, no pressure, and no failure. Just steady progress as the underground slowly reveals its secrets.

Discover and Sell

As you dig deeper, you will uncover valuable resources and rare items hidden beneath the island. Everything you dig can be sold to earn coins, which you then use to grow stronger and dig even further.

Deep Upgrade System

Customize your progress with 6 different upgrades, each changing how your rat works underground:

🚀 Speed
Dig faster and reach deeper layers more quickly.

🍀 Luck
Increase your chances of finding rare and valuable items.

😴 Rest Time
Reduce downtime so your rat gets back to digging sooner.

💰 Sell Bonus
Earn more coins from every item you sell.

🎒 Inventory Capacity
Carry more items before needing to sell.

🤖 Auto Sell
Automatically sell items to keep progress flowing smoothly.

Each upgrade pushes you deeper and makes the idle loop more satisfying.

Customize Your Cozy Setup

Idle Rat is not just about numbers. You can personalize your little island by purchasing and equipping different skins.

🐀 Character Skins

Change your rat’s appearance by purchasing and equipping different skins.

⛺ Tents

Buy and switch between different tent designs to customize your island.
🪑 Chairs

Replace your chair with cozy alternatives to complete your setup.

Buy them, equip them, and create a setup that feels uniquely yours.

Made to Stay With You

The always on top window turns Idle Rat into a companion game. It lives on your screen while you do other things, quietly making progress. Resize it, move it anywhere, and let it blend into your daily routine.

A Calm Pixel Art World

Enjoy a peaceful tropical atmosphere brought to life with charming pixel art and smooth idle animations. Everything is designed to feel relaxing, warm, and unobtrusive.

Idle Rat: Island Digger is about slowing down, enjoying small wins, and letting progress happen naturally.

Sit back, keep it on top, and let your tiny rat dig deeper. 🌊🐀

deals.name: Family Roadshow: Hidden Adventures Collector's Edition
deals.short_description: A world tour, dozens of hidden objects, beautiful locations, and mini-games — all presented in a TV show format. Build your souvenir collection and unlock new places in the special edition.
deals.detailed_description:
🌎 Travel the World in TV-Show Format

Family Roadshow: Hidden Adventures turns hidden-object gameplay into a global journey. Each new location feels like a fresh episode — from tropical beaches to bustling megacities and peaceful natural spots.

🔍 Hidden Object Search Across Vivid, Memorable Locations

Every scene is packed with carefully placed items. The route includes 30 fascinating points around the world: national parks, historical landmarks, rare natural sites, and places usually seen only by true travel enthusiasts. Mini-games add rhythm, helping you unlock new areas and expand your souvenir collection.

🎮 Collector’s Edition

• 10 additional exclusive locations
• 10 new mini-games + 12 puzzles
• 30 unique souvenirs for your collection room
• Colorful desktop wallpapers with world scenery
• Music player in travel-show style

deals.name: Where’s My Lewd Deck? Deep ’n Dive
deals.short_description: Sun, pool, and temptation. At Hidden Cove Resort, searching the scenery has never been so pleasurable. Find the lost deck and unlock rewards in Hentai, Bara, or Futa. Relax, explore, and enjoy a design made for your... comfort.
deals.detailed_description:
You have arrived at Hidden Cove Resort, a place where the sun kisses your skin, the water never gets cold, and the fun never ends. Crystal-clear pools, tropical bars, a seaside amusement park, and rooms that feel like they were made for sin. But right at check-in, you realize: someone has scattered your sensual deck all over the resort.

It wasn't a mistake. It was an invitation.

Your mission is to explore. Scour sun loungers, locker rooms, park attractions, and locked suites. Each interactive scenario hides cards that reveal much more than just simple suits.

One Resort, Three Experiences. The content of the cards depends entirely on your appetite. Personalize your stay by choosing between Hentai, Bara, or Futa.

By finding cards of your preferred genre, you permanently unlock exclusive art in your gallery. The deeper you explore the resort, the spicier the rewards become.

Features:

  • 3 Spicy Game Modes: Choose your preference between Hentai, Bara, or Futa at any time. The game adapts the found cards to your taste!

  • 150 Sensual Cards: A vast collection of exclusive art to find and unlock.

  • 7 Interactive Resort Scenarios: Explore everything from the hotel lobby and luxury rooms to water parks and roller coasters.

  • Relaxing and Addictive Gameplay: Search the scenery at your own pace, with no time limit.

  • One-Handed Play: Design intended for your... comfort.

deals.name: A Game About Shooting Bullets At Bullets (AGASBAB)
deals.short_description: A 3D incremental FPS game where you don’t move, only your bullets do. You’re stuck in space with nothing to do but shoot bullets...at bullets. Watch bullets bounce out of control, numbers explode, and a quiet room turn into pure chaos.
deals.detailed_description:
Shoot Bullets… At Bullets

Shoot bullets at other bullets in a fully physics-based 3D world.
Your bullets never disappear and are not affected by gravity. They stay in the room, collide with each other, bounce, and create endless interactions. Every session turns into a chaotic sandbox of motion, collisions, and score explosions.

A Different Kind of Incremental Progression

Instead of a traditional skill tree, the game gives you full control over your session settings.

Most stats can be increased and decreased at any time.
Want fewer bullets? Less bounce? Slower chaos? You can do that.

Upgrades unlock new levels and options, but you are never forced into a single path.
You can’t lose. The goal is not to be the strongest, but to find the most fun balance of settings.

Active Abilities to Shake Things Up

Enhance your runs with simple but powerful abilities:

  • Anti-Gravity – Bullets are pushed upward instead of falling.

  • Bullet Scale – Make bullets bigger for more collisions.

  • Multi Shot – Fire several bullets at once.

  • Slow Motion – Slow everything down and enjoy the chaos.

Abilities are here to spice things up, not to overwhelm.

Color Themes

Choose between multiple color themes and customize the look of your game.
Bullets and UI adapt to your selected color, letting you play in a style that feels right to you.

deals.name: UP CORE
deals.short_description: One mistake could be your last. Overcome punishing obstacles with razor-sharp reflexes, push your limits, and master the art of parkour on your way to the top. No room for error!
deals.detailed_description:
This isn't just a parkour game; it's a gauntlet that tests both your reflexes and your mind. While soaring through dynamic platforms, you must watch out for more than just the abyss—fake doors are everywhere. Can you reach the summit in a world where every step could be a trap?

Key Features:

  • Challenging Parkour: Moving platforms, rotating obstacles, and dangerous paths where timing is everything.

  • Strategic Exploration: Search for hidden keys to unlock your path, but beware—not every door leads to progress!

  • Mind Games: Trust your intuition in levels filled with fake doors and deceptive routes designed to mislead you.

  • Precision Movement: Experience fluid controls and jumps that require pixel-perfect timing.

deals.name: Stardust Sandbox
deals.short_description: A creative sandbox simulation where you experiment with physical interactions, build structures, and observe emergent behaviors in a world fully under your control.
deals.detailed_description:
A physical sandbox to experiment, create and observe

Stardust Sandbox is a creative sandbox simulation inspired by classic falling-sand games. The game provides a free, experimental environment where each element follows its own physical rules, allowing you to build structures, trigger reactions, and observe emergent behaviors naturally.

Total freedom, no pressure

You decide how to play.

Create complex systems, test specific interactions, set up simple scenarios, or simply relax and watch the world react to your actions. Stardust Sandbox adapts to players who enjoy deep experimentation as well as those who prefer a contemplative experience.

Every session is different — small changes can produce completely unexpected results.

Key features

  • 91 interactive elements with unique behaviors

  • Physics-based sandbox simulation

  • Full control over time (pause and resume the simulation at any moment)

  • Non-linear, open-ended gameplay

  • Retro pixel art visuals

  • Original soundtrack

  • Day–night cycle system

A space for curiosity and creativity

If you enjoy sandbox simulations, emergent systems, creative experimentation, or simply relaxing by watching simple rules generate complex outcomes, Stardust Sandbox offers a place where logic and imagination meet.
